configurations.name: Bag Visualization
configurations.command: source /opt/ros/${ROS_DISTRO}/setup.bash && source install/setup.bash && exec ros2 launch concrete_block_perception bag_visualization.launch.py

configurations.name: Perception Pipeline
configurations.command: source /opt/ros/${ROS_DISTRO}/setup.bash && source install/setup.bash && exec ros2 launch concrete_block_perception perception.launch.py use_sim_time:=true use_gpu:=false calib_yaml:=calib_zed2i_to_seyond_old_sensor_head.yaml

configurations.name: Perception Pipeline Continuous
configurations.command: source /opt/ros/${ROS_DISTRO}/setup.bash && source install/setup.bash && exec ros2 launch concrete_block_perception perception.launch.py use_sim_time:=true use_gpu:=true perception_mode:=CONTINUOUS

configurations.name: Perception Pipeline + SAM2 Inputs
configurations.command: source /opt/ros/${ROS_DISTRO}/setup.bash && source install/setup.bash && exec ros2 launch concrete_block_perception perception_sam2_inputs.launch.py use_sim_time:=true use_gpu:=true

configurations.name: SAM2 Segmentation
configurations.command: source /opt/ros/${ROS_DISTRO}/setup.bash && source install/setup.bash && exec ros2 launch concrete_block_perception sam2_segmentation_for_perception.launch.py use_sim_time:=true sam2_device:=cuda log_every_n_frames:=1

configurations.name: SAM2 Video Segmentation
configurations.command: source /opt/ros/${ROS_DISTRO}/setup.bash && source install/setup.bash && exec ros2 launch concrete_block_perception sam2_video_segmentation_for_perception.launch.py use_sim_time:=true sam2_device:=cuda clip_length:=4 clip_stride:=1 offload_video_to_cpu:=false
